reference: For the last three days, I have been experiencing back pain, specifically on the left side of my back. Whenever I move my head to the left or right, I feel light pain. I have taken Myotop tablets and Pantoprazole forty mg, but I am facing allergic issues. Is there full-body inflammation? Can you suggest another medicine, please?
text: For the last three days, I have been experiencing back pain, specifically on the left side of my back. Whenever I move my head to the left or right, I feel light pain. I have taken Myotop tablets and Pantoprofen for the emigrants, but I am facing allergic issues. Is there full body inflammation? Can you suggest another medicine, please?
